class.name: CSGBox3D
class.description: This node allows you to create a box for use with the CSG system. [b]Note:[/b] CSG nodes are intended to be used for level prototyping. Creating CSG nodes has a significant CPU cost compared to creating a [MeshInstance3D] with a [PrimitiveMesh]. Moving a CSG node within another CSG node also has a significant CPU cost, so it should be avoided during gameplay.

members.member: When not null, sets a custom material for the bottom face of the CSGBox. Useful for floors.
The material used to render the box.
Enabling this will scale the UVs to account for CSGBox size, maintaining uniform texel size. [b]Note:[/b] [member scale_uv] might have issues with non-repeating textures.
The box's width, height and depth.
When not null, sets a custom material for the top face of the CSGBox. Useful for roofs or ceilings.

Enabling this will use UVs identical to those from previous versions of godot. Disabling this will use UVs better fit for level prototyping, with the side faces aligned along the Y axis and the top and bottom faces aligned along the Z axis. [b]Note:[/b] [member scale_uv] only works when [member uv_compatibility_mode] is disabled.
Rotates the top and bottom faces of CSGBox3D.
Offsets the UVs of the CSGBox.
Uniformly scales UVs to set the texel size.
